metadata.title: GS1 Services | Barcodes, GTIN, GLN & SSCC in Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: Explore GS1 Saudi Arabia’s official services including GTIN barcodes, Global Location Numbers, Serial Shipping Container Codes, ZATCA compliance, and traceability solutions.

hero.subtitle: Empowering your business with global standards and solutions for efficiency, visibility, and growth.

section.title: GS1 Saudi Arabia Services
section.description: We provide a range of services designed to help you identify, capture, and share information efficiently.

cta.title: Ready to Streamline Your Business?
cta.description: Join thousands of businesses using GS1 standards to drive efficiency and growth. Get started today with the global language of business.

detail.standardized_desc: Globally recognized identification for seamless trade.
detail.empower: Empower your supply chain with our universal {acronym} solutions

metadata.title: GTIN Barcode Service | Get a Saudi Arabia Barcode (Prefix 628)
metadata.description: Get your official GS1 GTIN barcode from GS1 Saudi Arabia (prefix 628). List on Amazon, Noon, SFDA-regulated markets, and global retailers with a single verified product identifier.

global-trade-item-number.title: Global Trade Item Number (GTIN)
global-trade-item-number.description: Uniquely identify your products with GTINs (barcodes) to sell in retail stores and online marketplaces globally.
global-trade-item-number.shortDescription: The global standard for uniquely identifying products.
global-trade-item-number.detailDescription: The Global Trade Item Number (GTIN) is the industry standard for the unique identification of trade items. It is the number you see beneath the barcode on almost every product in the world. By using a GTIN, you ensure that your product is uniquely identified within the global supply chain, preventing confusion with other products and facilitating smooth transactions across borders.

modules.title: Universal Barcode Provision
modules.description: Globally accepted barcode standards with unique assignment for products, assets, and hardware. Suitable for local and international supply chains.

modules.title: 1D & 2D Barcode Solutions
modules.description: Implementation of linear barcodes, QR codes, and DataMatrix. Supports item-level, carton-level, and pallet-level identification.

modules.title: Serialization Systems
modules.description: Unique serial numbers for every individual product to ensure end-to-end item-level traceability and regulatory compliance.

modules.title: Supply Chain Traceability
modules.description: Establish parent-child relationships between items, cartons, and pallets for full visibility across manufacturing and warehousing.

features: Ensure global compliance and interoperability
Improve supply chain transparency and accuracy
Reduce errors, counterfeiting, and manual processes
Enable complete product traceability and recall readiness
Support future standards and digital transformation

metadata.title: GLN Service | Global Location Number for Saudi Businesses
metadata.description: Get a Global Location Number (GLN) from GS1 Saudi Arabia to uniquely identify warehouses, stores, hospitals, and business entities in the Kingdom’s supply chain.

global-location-number.title: Global Location Number (GLN)
global-location-number.description: Identify physical locations and legal entities to streamline supply chain communications and transactions.
global-location-number.shortDescription: Identify physical locations and legal entities uniquely.
global-location-number.detailDescription: The Global Location Number (GLN) uniquely identifies physical locations and legal entities. From a single shelf in a warehouse to an entire shipping dock, GLN offers the precision needed for modern logistics and supply chain management. It eliminates costly errors associated with confusing delivery addresses.

modules.title: Precise Location Identification
modules.description: Identify specific functional areas within your business, from loading docks to hospital beds, with absolute precision.

modules.title: Supply Chain Visibility
modules.description: Track the movement of goods between parties with certainty of origin and destination.

modules.title: Electronic Data Interchange (EDI)
modules.description: Streamline order-to-cash processes by replacing manual address entries with unique location codes in digital messages.

features: Streamline shipping and receiving processes
Avoid costly delivery errors
Essential for EDI transactions
Identify legal entities and physical locations

metadata.title: SSCC | Serial Shipping Container Code for Saudi Logistics
metadata.description: Get GS1 SSCC numbers from GS1 Saudi Arabia to uniquely identify pallets, cases, and shipping containers — enabling real-time logistics tracking, Advance Ship Notices, and automated warehouse receiving.

serial-shipping-container-code.title: Serial Shipping Container Code (SSCC)
serial-shipping-container-code.description: Track and trace logistic units throughout the supply chain with a unique identifier for every pallet or shipment.
serial-shipping-container-code.shortDescription: Track logistics units across the supply chain.
serial-shipping-container-code.detailDescription: The Serial Shipping Container Code (SSCC) acts as a license plate for your logistics units. It enables individual tracking of pallets, cases, and cartons as they move through the supply chain. It allows products to be received, tracked, and cross-docked without the need to open the package.

modules.title: License Plate Tracking
modules.description: Track every logistics unit individually with a unique serial number worldwide.

modules.title: Automated Goods Receipt
modules.description: Scan one barcode to receive an entire pallet without checking individual items manually using Advance Ship Notices (ASN).

modules.title: Inventory Accuracy
modules.description: Improve stock visibility and reduce shrinkage during transport and storage.

features: Accelerate cross-docking operations
Reduce transit and receiving times
Eliminate manual checking errors
Global standard for logistics labeling

metadata.title: SEC Barcode Compliance | GS1 for Saudi Electricity Company Suppliers
metadata.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia provides Data Matrix barcodes and serialized identifiers fully compliant with Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) vendor requirements and SAP EWM integration.

saudi-electricity-company.title: Saudi Electricity Company (SEC)
saudi-electricity-company.description: Specialized barcoding and identification solutions for Saudi Electricity Company suppliers and vendors.
saudi-electricity-company.shortDescription: Compliance solutions for Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) suppliers.
saudi-electricity-company.detailDescription: Customized GS1 standards implementation for the energy sector, specifically designed to meet Saudi Electricity Company (SEC) requirements. We help suppliers implement Data Matrix barcodes for material tracking, incorporating Vendor Codes, PO Numbers, and Serial Numbers as mandated by SEC regulations.

modules.title: SEC Mandate Compliance
modules.description: Generate GS1 Data Matrix barcodes compliant with SEC's specific identifier requirements (Project Name, Vendor Code, PO Number).

modules.title: Material Identification
modules.description: Assign unique Global Trade Item Numbers (GTINs) to utility materials for seamless integration with SEC's SAP EWM system.

modules.title: Serialized Asset Tracking
modules.description: Implement unique serial numbers (AI 21) for high-value assets to ensure lifetime traceability and maintenance tracking.

features: Certified GS1 barcode generation for SEC vendors
Seamless integration with SAP EWM requirements
Verify material tags to prevent rejection at delivery
Expert guidance on technical specifications

metadata.title: Tobacco Track & Trace | ZATCA Compliance with GS1 Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia delivers ZATCA-compliant tobacco traceability: digital tax stamp integration, multi-level aggregation, and reporting from production to point of sale.

tobacco-traceability.title: Tobacco Traceability
tobacco-traceability.description: Special Category: Ensure compliance with tobacco regulations through our specialized tracking and tracing solutions.
tobacco-traceability.shortDescription: Regulatory compliance for ZATCA tobacco tracking.
tobacco-traceability.detailDescription: A comprehensive solution for tobacco manufacturers and importers to comply with Saudi Arabia's Track and Trace regulations. Our system ensures that every pack, carton, and master case is uniquely identified, aggregated, and traceable from production to point of sale, preventing illicit trade and ensuring tax compliance.

modules.title: Digital Tax Stamp Integration
modules.description: Seamlessly integrate GS1 identifiers with ZATCA's digital tax stamp system for automated reporting and verification.

modules.title: Multi-Level Aggregation
modules.description: Link individual packs to cartons and master cases (Parent-Child relationships) to simplify logistics and customs clearance.

modules.title: Anti-Illicit Trade
modules.description: Enable real-time verification of product authenticity to protect brand reputation and consumer safety.

features: Full compliance with GCC and ZATCA regulations
Serialization for anti-counterfeiting
Real-time data sharing with regulatory bodies
End-to-end supply chain visibility

metadata.title: Verified by GS1 | Product Authentication & Anti-Counterfeiting
metadata.description: Verified by GS1 lets consumers, retailers, and partners instantly validate product barcode data against the official GS1 global registry, protecting brands from counterfeiting in Saudi Arabia.

verified-by-gs1.title: Verified by GS1
verified-by-gs1.description: Authenticate and verify your products with the globally trusted GS1 verification service, building consumer confidence and combating counterfeiting.
verified-by-gs1.shortDescription: Global product authentication and consumer trust.
verified-by-gs1.detailDescription: Verified by GS1 is the world's most trusted product verification service. It allows consumers, retailers, and supply chain partners to instantly verify that a product's barcode data matches official GS1 registry information — fighting counterfeits, improving data quality, and building brand trust across every channel.

modules.title: GS1 Registry Lookup
modules.description: Cross-check product identifiers against the official GS1 global registry to confirm authenticity and data accuracy in real time.

modules.title: Brand & Product Data Syndication
modules.description: Publish rich, verified product information — images, descriptions, certifications — to all trading partners from one trusted source.

modules.title: Consumer-Facing Verification
modules.description: Enable shoppers to scan a barcode or QR code and instantly see verified product details, fostering transparency and loyalty.

modules.title: Counterfeit Detection
modules.description: Identify duplicate or fraudulent barcodes circulating in the market and protect your brand's integrity.

features: Globally recognized verification seal
Reduce counterfeit products in the market
Improve product data quality and consistency
Build consumer trust and brand transparency
Seamless integration with e-commerce platforms

metadata.title: GS1 Traceability Solutions | End-to-End Supply Chain Visibility in KSA
metadata.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia’s traceability solutions enable full supply chain visibility: batch tracking, EPCIS event capture, SFDA compliance, and recall management for food, pharma, and retail.

traceability.title: Traceability
traceability.description: End-to-end supply chain visibility — track products from origin to consumer using GS1 standards for full transparency and recall readiness.
traceability.shortDescription: End-to-end supply chain visibility from origin to consumer.
traceability.detailDescription: GS1 Traceability solutions give businesses complete visibility of their products as they move through the supply chain. By capturing and sharing standardized data at every step — from raw material sourcing to final delivery — companies can respond rapidly to recalls, meet regulatory requirements, and build consumer confidence.

modules.title: Batch & Lot Traceability
modules.description: Assign unique batch and lot numbers to production runs, enabling targeted recalls and quality investigations.

modules.title: Item-Level Serialization
modules.description: Apply unique serial numbers to every individual unit for granular, item-level tracking across the entire supply chain.

modules.title: Event Data Capture
modules.description: Record EPCIS events at each supply chain checkpoint for a full audit trail.

modules.title: Regulatory Compliance Reporting
modules.description: Generate and submit traceability reports required by SFDA and other regulatory bodies.

features: Rapid product recall capabilities
Full compliance with SFDA traceability mandates
Reduce waste and improve supply chain efficiency
Real-time visibility from farm/factory to shelf
Supports fresh food, pharma, and general trade

metadata.title: Fixed Assets Management | GS1 Barcode Tracking for Saudi Organizations
metadata.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia’s fixed assets management solution tags, tracks, and audits every organizational asset with GS1 barcodes, integrating with SAP, Oracle, and major ERP platforms.

fixed-assets-management.title: Fixed Assets Management
fixed-assets-management.description: Efficiently manage and track organizational fixed assets using GS1 barcodes, reducing loss and ensuring accurate asset register maintenance.
fixed-assets-management.shortDescription: GS1-powered barcode solutions for asset tracking.
fixed-assets-management.detailDescription: Our Fixed Assets Management solution leverages GS1 standards to help organizations tag, track, and audit every physical asset — from IT equipment and machinery to furniture and vehicles. Eliminate manual spreadsheet errors, reduce asset loss, and maintain an always-accurate asset register.

modules.title: Asset Tagging & Labeling
modules.description: Generate GS1-compliant barcode or RFID labels for every asset, ensuring unique identification throughout its lifecycle.

modules.title: Asset Register Integration
modules.description: Sync asset data with SAP, Oracle, or other ERP systems for real-time updates to your fixed asset register.

modules.title: Periodic Audit & Verification
modules.description: Conduct fast, mobile-based asset audits by scanning barcodes — eliminating time-consuming manual counting.

modules.title: Lifecycle & Maintenance Tracking
modules.description: Monitor asset condition, depreciation schedules, and maintenance history from acquisition to disposal.

features: Reduce asset loss and ghost assets
Accurate and up-to-date asset register
Faster audit cycles with mobile scanning
Integration with leading ERP platforms
Compliance with IFRS 16 and local regulations

metadata.title: Healthcare Management | GS1 Standards for Hospitals & Pharma in Saudi Arabia
metadata.description: GS1 Saudi Arabia applies global standards to hospitals, pharmacies, and medical device makers: UDI compliance, drug serialization, patient identification, and SFDA/MOH regulatory alignment.

healthcare-management.title: Healthcare Management
healthcare-management.description: Implement GS1 standards across healthcare settings to ensure patient safety, accurate medical device identification, and drug traceability.
healthcare-management.shortDescription: GS1 standards for patient safety and medical traceability.
healthcare-management.detailDescription: Our Healthcare Management solution applies GS1 global standards to hospitals, pharmacies, and medical device manufacturers in Saudi Arabia. From accurate patient identification to drug and device traceability, GS1 standards reduce medication errors, streamline procurement, and ensure compliance with SFDA and MOH regulations.

modules.title: Medical Device Identification (UDI)
modules.description: Assign and manage Unique Device Identifiers (UDIs) for surgical instruments, implants, and medical equipment in compliance with SFDA requirements.

modules.title: Pharmaceutical Traceability
modules.description: Serialize drug packages with GS1 DataMatrix codes to track medicines from manufacturer to patient, preventing counterfeits.

modules.title: Patient & Specimen Identification
modules.description: Implement GS1-compliant wristbands and specimen labels to eliminate patient misidentification events.

modules.title: Hospital Supply Chain Optimization
modules.description: Standardize procurement, receiving, and inventory processes across all hospital departments using GS1 identifiers.

features: Reduce medication errors and adverse events
SFDA and MOH compliance for drug serialization
Accurate medical device lifecycle management
Improved inventory visibility across hospital stores
Interoperability with national health information systems
